**Keebra Park State High School** (KPSHS), referred to as **Keebra Park** or **Keebra**, is a [coeducational](/wiki/Coeducational "Coeducational") [public](/wiki/Public_school_(government_funded) "Public school (government funded)") [secondary](/wiki/Secondary_education "Secondary education") school, located in the [Gold Coast](/wiki/Gold_Coast,_Queensland "Gold Coast, Queensland") suburb of [Southport, Queensland](/wiki/Southport,_Queensland "Southport, Queensland"), [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia").[[11]](#cite_note-11) The school falls within Division 6 of [Gold Coast council](/wiki/City_of_Gold_Coast "City of Gold Coast").[[12]](#cite_note-council_gold-coast-council_current(2025)-12)

## Students

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Keebra_Park_State_High_School&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Students")]

### Year levels

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Keebra_Park_State_High_School&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Year levels")]

Queensland secondary schools started catering for [Year 7](/wiki/Year_Seven "Year Seven") to align Queensland with the other states, as part of the official implementation in 2015 of [Anna Bligh](/wiki/Anna_Bligh "Anna Bligh")'s state-wide "Flying Start" program.[[13]](#cite_note-year-7_courier-mail_2015-13) As part of a 2013 trial, some schools implemented this transition early. 2013 was the last year Keebra Park State High School catered only for [Year 8](/wiki/Year_Eight "Year Eight") to [Year 12](/wiki/Year_Twelve "Year Twelve").[[14]](#cite_note-annual-report_2013-14): 2 Since 2014,[[15]](#cite_note-annual-report_2014-15): 3 the year levels currently offered at this school are Year 7 to Year 12.[[16]](#cite_note-annual-report_2022-16): 2

## Administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Keebra_Park_State_High_School&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Administration")]

### Staff

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Keebra_Park_State_High_School&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Staff")]

As of 2025, the school has a teaching staff of 87 (Full-time equivalent: 81.8) and a non-teaching staff of 37 (Full-time equivalent of 30.1).[[8]](#cite_note-acara_2025-8)

### Principals

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Keebra_Park_State_High_School&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Principals")]

The first principal of the school was Garfield Prowse in 1973.[[17]](#cite_note-prowse_hansard(keebra-pk-shs)_2019-17) As of 2025, the current principal is Adam Brandis.[[18]](#cite_note-brandis_innis-sc(principals-message)_current(2025)-18)[[19]](#cite_note-brandis_innis-sc(out-staff)_current(2025)-19) Recent principals have included:
